system.description: There is something you do not want others to know. This could be about yourself, or some great matter of state, etc. Perhaps you were once a convict who assumed a noble’s identity, or you know that the King is not the rightful heir, etc. There will be times when this secret comes back to haunt you. Blackmailers, magistrates, inquisitors, and more may come to trouble you. Whenever bad things happen to you, or you must go to great lengths to protect the secret, the GM will award a Fortune Point.
